text.en: Rectified linear activation traces through early neural vision work and later became a standard activation for deep networks. Its simple non-saturating shape helped train deeper models more effectively than many older squashing nonlinearities.
text.zh: 整流线性激活可以追溯到早期神经视觉研究，后来成为深度网络的标准激活函数。它简单且不易饱和的形状，比许多早期压缩型非线性函数更有利于训练深层模型。
